home.hero_sub: Take our psychometric assessment and let our advanced machine learning engine predict your optimal career path, identify skill gaps, and guide your journey.
home.why_sub: Comprehensive AI-powered tools designed to help you make informed career decisions
home.feature1_desc: Advanced psychometric assessments using RIASEC and Multiple Intelligence frameworks
home.feature2_desc: Get career recommendations tailored to your unique personality, skills, and interests
home.feature3_desc: Identify the skills you need and get personalized course recommendations
home.feature4_desc: Step-by-step execution plans to bridge the gap from where you are to where you want to be
home.feature5_desc: Get instant, personalized advice from our AI career mentor available 24/7
home.feature6_desc: Track your learning progress with gamified milestones, XP and daily streaks

dashboard.title: Mission Control
dashboard.no_curriculum_desc: You need to choose a career path to generate your AI masterplan.
dashboard.all_tasks_cleared: You've cleared all daily tasks. Check timeline for next phase.
dashboard.regenerate_desc: Regenerate your AI curriculum based on your latest assessment.

results.title: Your Career Matches
results.subtitle: Based on your psychometric profile, here are the careers that best match you.
results.not_satisfied_title: Not satisfied with your career results?
results.not_satisfied_desc: The Quick Assessment provides a baseline, but our advanced Machine Learning model works best when you provide more data. Complete the full 55-question psychometric evaluation for highly accurate, personalized career matching.
results.processing_sub: Your psychometric profile is being analyzed by our ensemble model (XGBoost + SVM + Gradient Boosting). This takes ~30 seconds.
results.no_assessment_desc: You haven't completed a psychometric assessment yet.
results.error_desc: The ML pipeline encountered an error. Please try retaking the assessment.
results.answers_saved: answers saved. Continue from where you left off to improve your ML prediction accuracy.

assessment.question: Question
assessment.select_best: Select the option that best describes you.
assessment.elaborate: Elaborate your thoughts in the text area.
assessment.profile_queued: Your profile is being queued. Redirecting to results...
assessment.full_assessment_complete: You've completed the full psychometric assessment! Submit now to receive your complete career analysis.
assessment.partial_analysis: You can see your partial career analysis now, or continue to get a more accurate result.

chat.greeting: Hi! I'm your PathPilot AI Mentor. I can help you with your daily missions, explain concepts, or adjust your roadmap. What are we working on today?
chat.connection_error: I encountered an error connecting to my core.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your career journey
